raw_consumer_statement:
Amex is practicing corrupt treatment towards their cardholders. On XX/XX/2023, I purchased a pair of sunglasses from the merchant XXXX for {$460.00}. They sent me a damaged pair of sunglasses and I immediately reported it to them. They refused to send me a label for return. I complained to American Express and all Amex does is simply ignore me as a customer and bill me incorrectly. They refuse time after time to examine the documents I send them and just close out my dispute with the bill remaining on my account. The most frustrating aspect of Amex is their cruel behavior of responding robotically the same response to each of my claims. They simply say the merchant delivered the items and the bill shall remain of the account. Regardless of delivery, that isnt at all the case. The case is that they delivered damaged items against our terms of sale and they refuse to send me a label to return it. I even asked Amex to show me a label from the merchant but they refuse. All they do is say there was delivery and they bill me despite the delivery being out of terms by sending me a damaged item. 
Amex must be investigated. This is not the first time they ignore customer disputes and respond robotically clearly proving they do NOT ever actually examine any case but rather just bill consumers erroneously. I venture to say that they probably get the money back from the merchant and bill the customer as well because my case is so clear cut they should easily get the money back from the merchant. This should be investigated and they should probably be shut down for corrupt practices. 
I must reiterate that this case has been ongoing for over 6 months already and NEVER once did Amex properly examine my documents or any of the case details and the proof is their response is always the same generic response. Never did they even ask me about the damaged item. They simply just keep billing me despite a clear case of the merchants non compliance. 
The bottom line is, I am due a refund because I can not be held responsible to pay for damaged items that the merchant refuses to accept back for return. And I stress that the merchant never provided me an actual label to return the item back to them and surely I can not be held responsible to purchase a shipping label on my expense after their failure to accommodate our sale agreement.
